title: draba × pseudonivalis
intro: Draba × pseudonivalis is a hybrid plant species, specifically a cross between Draba incana and Draba nivalis, belonging to the mustard family (Brassicaceae). The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and fungi. The health benefits of Draba × pseudonivalis include its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may contribute to its use in treating various ailments. However, information on herbal preparations and its widespread use is limited, but it is often used as a raw material in traditional medicine preparations, often combined with other herbs.
